name: Chip Shot Golf Simulators
about: Chip Shot Golf Simulators is a venue in Payson, Utah, offering 24/7 access to golf simulation technology. The facility is equipped with Trackman simulators, providing detailed swing analytics and insights for players of all skill levels. It accepts both tee time bookings and monthly memberships, with a focus on combining serious practice with a welcoming and accessible environment for casual players.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access with door code for flexible booking
Industry-leading Trackman technology for accurate swing analysis
Welcoming environment suitable for all skill levels
In-house pros available for tips and technology assistance

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading technology used for swing analysis and simulation

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if players must bring their own. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for details on equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention policies on outside food or drinks, suggesting it may not be permitted. It is best to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for 18 holes, as this can vary depending on simulator usage and player pace. Contact the venue for more details.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Chip Shot is welcoming to all skill levels and does not restrict age, making it suitable for families. Younger users should be accompanied by an adult.
